config.noisium.title: Noisium Configuration
config.noisium.noiseChunkGenerator.toolt: Optimizes NoiseChunkGenerator#populateNoise for 20-30% speedup in world generation. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chunkSection.tooltip: Optimizes ChunkSection#populateBiomes axis order. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chainedBlockSource.toolti: Micro-optimization for ChainedBlockSource lookups. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chunkNoiseSamplerInterpol: Optimizes ChunkNoiseSampler#interpolateZ by skipping quarter-step cases (deltaZ=0.0) for 5-15% noise generation speedup. Requires restart.
config.noisium.useGuiGraphics.tooltip: Enables GuiGraphics-accelerated rendering paths when available.
noisium.configuration.title: Noisium Configuration
noisium.configuration.noiseChunkGenerato: Optimizes noise generation in NoiseChunkGenerator (requires restart)
noisium.configuration.chainedBlockSource: Optimizes chained block source operations (requires restart)
noisium.configuration.chunkNoiseSamplerI: Optimizes ChunkNoiseSampler interpolateZ for 5-15% noise generation speedup (requires restart)
